zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeliza Beaumont於大約1040年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利波蒙特時，她的父親Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumont15歲，母親Adele Gournay32歲。她於1048年與Hugh de Grandmesnil在法國豪-諾門迪艾布聶維爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1091年7月11日在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年52歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪奧內沙吉艾福盧吉諾特-達-度-波斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeliza Beaumont于大约1040年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利波蒙特时，她的父亲Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumont15岁，母亲Adele Gournay32岁。她于1048年与Hugh de Grandmesnil在法国豪-諾門迪艾布聶維爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1091年7月11日在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年52岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪奧內沙吉艾福盧吉諾特-達-度-波斯。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

en.lifeSummary: When Adeliza Beaumont was born about 1040, in Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumont, was 15 and her mother, Adele Gournay, was 32. She married Hugh de Grandmesnil in 1048, in Bourneville, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 11 July 1091, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeliza Beaumont est née environ 1040, à Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumont, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Adele Gournay, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Grandmesnil en 1048, à Bourneville, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 juillet 1091, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeliza Beaumont um 1040 in Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumont 15 und ihre Mutter Adele Gournay 32. Sie hat 1048 in Bourneville, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Hugh de Grandmesnil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Juli 1091 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza Beaumont è nata il circa 1040 nel Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumont, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Adele Gournay, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Grandmesnil nel 1048, nel Bourneville, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 11 luglio 1091, nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeliza Beaumontが約1040年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメビーウモントで生まれた時，父Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumontは15歳，母Adele Gournayは32歳であった。1048年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアボウルネヴィルでHugh de Grandmesnilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1091年7月11日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで52歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンサイント-evロウルト-ノトレ-ダム-ドウ-ボイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeliza Beaumont(이)가 대략 1040년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 보몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumont(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adele Gournay(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1048년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 부른에빌에서 Hugh de Grandmesnil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1091년 7월 11일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 세인트-e브루트-노트레-다-드-보이스에 묻혔다.

Hanslope, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Leicester, Leicestershire, England, Unit: Leicester, Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumont, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Adele Gournay, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Grandmesnil em 1048, em Bourneville, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de julho de 1091, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeliza Beaumont родилась около 1040 г. в местности бомонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumont было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Adele Gournay, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Grandmesnil в 1048 г. в местности бурневилл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 11 июля 1091 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-eвроулт-нотре-дэме-ду-боис, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeliza Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1040, en Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ivo Bellomontensis de Beaumont, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Adele Gournay, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Hugh de Grandmesnil en 1048, en Bourneville, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 11 de julio de 1091, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
